title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.1198 - Discontinuance of involuntary dissolution
text:
351.1198.  Discontinuance of involuntary dissolution. — The involuntary or supervised voluntary dissolution of a cooperative may be discontinued at any time during the dissolution proceedings if it is established that cause for dissolution does not exist.  The court shall dismiss the proceedings and direct the receiver, if any, to redeliver to the cooperative its remaining property and assets.
(L. 2011 S.B. 366)
